impact:
First real perf baseline from /data/logs/perf.log post-ISS-013 (commit f5f9296). Sample size is small (n=1-5 per route from one user-browsing session), but several authed routes clearly exceed acceptable latency:

| Route | n | p50 | p95 | max | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| /tools/activity | 5 | 156 | 6194 | 6194 | One request at 6.2s — likely cold/empty cache; warm requests fast. Investigate cache priming. |
| ~~/dashboard/corp-stats~~ | ~~2~~ | ~~2113~~ | ~~2113~~ | ~~2113~~ | **FIXED in commit 4aaa5cc** — stale-while-revalidate. Cold 1388ms (once per container), warm 6-9ms. The 731ms re-fetch every 5-min TTL boundary is gone. |
| ~~/tools/fitting/saved~~ | ~~2~~ | ~~2001~~ | ~~2001~~ | ~~2001~~ | **FIXED in commit f751d7c** — DPS calc deferred to /tools/fitting/saved/dps. Warm 61ms (-91%), cold 1154ms (-42%). |
| /dashboard/kill-pulse | 2 | 1031 | 1031 | 1031 | Aggregate killmail query? |
| /dashboard/combat-profile | 2 | 914 | 914 | 914 | Similar — likely a heavy join. |
| /industry/calculate | 2 | 734 | 734 | 734 | Probably acceptable for the work it does; flag if it grows. |
| /character/<id> | 1 | — | 711 | 711 | Full character detail page render. |
| /dashboard | 2 | 615 | 615 | 615 | Top-level dashboard render. |

What was fine: /admin (117ms — the cache_stats SELECT COUNT(*) concern from project memory was unfounded), /map (86ms — surprising given recent star-map work), /tools/fitting (186ms — load is fast; saving slow but that's separate).

Recommendation: /dashboard/kill-pulse + /dashboard/combat-profile next (share infrastructure, one fix may cover both). Then /tools/activity 6s outlier (need more samples first to know if it's cold-cache one-off or sustained).

Next-step caveat: this is one user session. Re-measure after the suspect fixes land — sample sizes here are too small to declare a real distribution.
title: Several authed routes exceed 500ms p95 — perf baseline from ISS-013
